CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, sample_string VARCHAR);
SELECT id, sample_string, regexp_matches(sample_string, '(an)*') AS matches FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, '^banana$');
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, 'a.*a');
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, 'a{2,}');
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, '(an|ba)+');
SELECT ts.id, ts.sample_string FROM test_strings ts JOIN patterns p ON regexp_matches(ts.sample_string, p.pattern);
SELECT id, sample_string, regexp_matches(sample_string, '(~\d{2})?', 'i') AS matches FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, '.{5,}');
SELECT es.value FROM example_strings es WHERE regexp_matches(es.value, 'ana');
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, '(?!apple).*');
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, '^[a-zA-Z]+$');
SELECT id, sample_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_matches(sample_string, 'b.*a$', 'im');
